name: Signature Block
text: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement on the date first written above.

legal_basis.note: Competency to contract — authority to sign

invalid_if: Agreement not signed by authorized representatives
source: Indian Contract Act, 1872; Indian Evidence Act, 1872
title: Execution and Signatures

jurisdiction_constraints.general: Company signatory must have board resolution or POA authorising signing
jurisdiction_constraints.Maharashtra: Adjudication of stamp required if Maharashtra Stamp Act triggers
jurisdiction_constraints.Property: Registration Act 1908 S.17 requires witnesses for immovable property documents

dispute_hotspots: Authority of signatory — company employee signs without board resolution
Unstamped document — inadmissible in court (Indian Stamp Act S.35) until stamp duty paid
Electronic signature on stamp paper — conflicting state requirements
